title: No More Explosions
description: 🧨 Disable explosions in your world. Configurable!
body:
## 🧨❌ No More Explosions
**Disable explosions from TNT, TNT minecarts, creepers, crystals, and fireballs as desired.**

Use ```/function nme:settings``` or click on the message in the chat that appears after a ```/reload``` to configure your settings.

![Explosions that you can turn off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b6daf0c2f87d1b0ed5fee11bbaebda2bdcd68cb.png)

## 📚 How to Install the Datapack
### 👤 Singleplayer
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the ```"\.minecraft\saves\YOURWORLD\datapacks"``` folder.
Now enter your world. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
### 👥 Multiplayer (Server)
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the datapack folder, which is located in the default "world" folder.
Now join your server. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
